name: Project S: Skate Our Souls
original_name: โปรเจกต์ เอส เดอะซีรีส์: SOS
overview: Boo is a 17-year-old boy suffering from depression who finally finds a sense of purpose in skateboarding. However, his strict father is strongly against his new passion and forbids it.

trailers.title: Official International Trailer 'Project S The Series | SOS'
